result.stdout:
Description:
  Voyager Configuration Tool - Migration helper for JSON configuration encryption

Usage:
  Voyager.Configuration.Tool [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  encrypt                    Encrypt values in JSON configuration file
  decrypt                    Decrypt values in JSON configuration file
  encrypt-value <text>       Encrypt single text value
  decrypt-value <encrypted>  Decrypt single text value

commands.payload:
Description:
  Voyager Configuration Tool - Migration helper for JSON configuration encryption

Usage:
  Voyager.Configuration.Tool [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  encrypt                    Encrypt values in JSON configuration file
  decrypt                    Decrypt values in JSON configuration file
  encrypt-value <text>       Encrypt single text value
  decrypt-value <encrypted>  Decrypt single text value

result.stdout:
Description:
  Decrypt values in JSON configuration file

Usage:
  Voyager.Configuration.Tool decrypt [options]

Options:
  -i, --input <input> (REQUIRED)    Input encrypted JSON file
  -o, --output <output> (REQUIRED)  Output decrypted JSON file
  -k, --key <key>                   Encryption key (not recommended - use --key-env instead)
  --key-env <key-env>               Environment variable containing encryption key [default: ASPNETCORE_ENCODEKEY]
  -f, --force                       Overwrite existing output file
  -?, -h, --help                    Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Decrypt values in JSON configuration file

Usage:
  Voyager.Configuration.Tool decrypt [options]

Options:
  -i, --input <input> (REQUIRED)    Input encrypted JSON file
  -o, --output <output> (REQUIRED)  Output decrypted JSON file
  -k, --key <key>                   Encryption key (not recommended - use --key-env instead)
  --key-env <key-env>               Environment variable containing encryption key [default: ASPNETCORE_ENCODEKEY]
  -f, --force                       Overwrite existing output file
  -?, -h, --help                    Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Decrypt single text value

Usage:
  Voyager.Configuration.Tool decrypt-value <encrypted> [options]

Arguments:
  <encrypted>  Encrypted text to decrypt

Options:
  -k, --key <key>      Encryption key (not recommended - use --key-env instead)
  --key-env <key-env>  Environment variable containing encryption key [default: ASPNETCORE_ENCODEKEY]
  -?, -h, --help       Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Decrypt single text value

Usage:
  Voyager.Configuration.Tool decrypt-value <encrypted> [options]

Arguments:
  <encrypted>  Encrypted text to decrypt

Options:
  -k, --key <key>      Encryption key (not recommended - use --key-env instead)
  --key-env <key-env>  Environment variable containing encryption key [default: ASPNETCORE_ENCODEKEY]
  -?, -h, --help       Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Encrypt values in JSON configuration file

Usage:
  Voyager.Configuration.Tool encrypt [options]

Options:
  -i, --input <input> (REQUIRED)  Input plain JSON file
  -o, --output <output>           Output encrypted JSON file (default: overwrite input)
  -k, --key <key>                 Encryption key (not recommended - use --key-env instead)
  --key-env <key-env>             Environment variable containing encryption key [default: ASPNETCORE_ENCODEKEY]
  -f, --force                     Overwrite existing output file
  --in-place                      Encrypt file in-place (modify original)
  -?, -h, --help                  Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Encrypt values in JSON configuration file

Usage:
  Voyager.Configuration.Tool encrypt [options]

Options:
  -i, --input <input> (REQUIRED)  Input plain JSON file
  -o, --output <output>           Output encrypted JSON file (default: overwrite input)
  -k, --key <key>                 Encryption key (not recommended - use --key-env instead)
  --key-env <key-env>             Environment variable containing encryption key [default: ASPNETCORE_ENCODEKEY]
  -f, --force                     Overwrite existing output file
  --in-place                      Encrypt file in-place (modify original)
  -?, -h, --help                  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Encrypt single text value

Usage:
  Voyager.Configuration.Tool encrypt-value <text> [options]

Arguments:
  <text>  Text to encrypt

Options:
  -k, --key <key>      Encryption key (not recommended - use --key-env instead)
  --key-env <key-env>  Environment variable containing encryption key [default: ASPNETCORE_ENCODEKEY]
  -?, -h, --help       Show help and usage information
